glosses.vi: chuyển tiền; giới thiệu (đến bác sĩ chuyên khoa)
glosses.hi: पैसे भेजना; (विशेषज्ञ के पास) रेफर करना
glosses.ja: 振り込む; 専門医に紹介する

translations.en: I have to transfer the rent.
translations.es: Tengo que hacer una transferencia para el alquiler.
translations.fr: Je dois faire le virement du loyer.
translations.ru: Мне нужно перевести деньги за аренду.
translations.pt: Tenho que fazer a transferência do aluguel.
translations.he: אני צריך להעביר את שכר הדירה.
translations.vi: Tôi phải chuyển khoản tiền thuê nhà.
translations.uk: Мені треба переказати гроші за оренду.
translations.ja: 家賃を振り込まないといけない。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (V2); expresses necessity and selects a bare infinitive at clause end.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular, introducing the direct object NP.
Common noun (feminine); head of the direct object NP governed by the verb.
Lexical verb in infinitive; inseparable-prefix verb; governed by the modal auxiliary and placed clause-finally.

sentences.target: Er kann mir die zwanzig Euro überweisen.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ kan miːɐ̯ diː ˈtsvantsɪç ˈɔʏ̯ʁo ˌyːbɐˈvaɪ̯zn̩/

translations.de: Er kann mir die zwanzig Euro überweisen.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ kan miːɐ̯ diː ˈtsvantsɪç ˈɔʏ̯ʁo ˌyːbɐˈvaɪ̯zn̩/
translations.en: He can transfer the twenty euros to me.
translations.es: Él puede transferirme los veinte euros.
translations.fr: Il peut me virer vingt euros.
translations.it: Lui può farmi un bonifico di venti euro.
translations.zh-Hans: 他可以把二十欧元转给我。
translations.yue: 佢可以轉二十歐元俾我。
translations.ru: Он может перевести мне двадцать евро.
translations.pt: Ele pode me transferir os vinte euros.
translations.he: הוא יכול להעביר לי עשרים יורו.
translations.tr: O bana yirmi avroyu havale edebilir.
translations.vi: Anh ấy có thể chuyển khoản cho tôi 20 euro.
translations.ar: يمكنه أن يحوّل لي عشرين يورو.
translations.nl: Hij kan mij twintig euro overmaken.
translations.uk: Він може переказати мені двадцять євро.
translations.hu: Ő át tudja utalni nekem a húsz eurót.
translations.hi: वह मुझे 20 यूरो ट्रांसफर कर सकता है.
translations.pl: On może przelać mi te dwadzieścia euro.
translations.el: Μπορεί να μου μεταφέρει τα είκοσι ευρώ.
translations.nb: Han kan overføre tjue euro til meg.
translations.id: Dia bisa transfer 20 euro ke saya.
translations.sv: Han kan föra över tjugo euro till mig.
translations.ro: El poate să-mi transfere douăzeci de euro.
translations.cs: On mi může převést dvacet eur.
translations.da: Han kan overføre 20 euro til mig.
translations.fi: Hän voi siirtää minulle kaksikymmentä euroa.
translations.ja: 彼は私に20ユーロを振り込める。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (V2); expresses ability/possibility and selects a bare infinitive at clause end.
1st person singular dative personal pronoun; indirect object/recipient.
Definite article, accusative plural, introducing a specific amount as direct object.
Cardinal numeral modifying the head noun within the NP.
Common noun; head of the direct object NP (bare plural form with numeral).
Lexical verb in infinitive; inseparable-prefix verb; governed by the modal auxiliary and placed clause-finally.

sentences.target: Wir wollen das Geld heute überweisen.

translations.de: Wir wollen das Geld heute überweisen.
translations.en: We want to transfer the money today.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天想把钱转过去。
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים להעביר את הכסף היום.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn chuyển tiền hôm nay.
translations.nl: We willen het geld vandaag overmaken.
translations.hu: Ma át akarjuk utalni a pénzt.
translations.hi: हम आज पैसे ट्रांसफर करना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Θέλουμε να μεταφέρουμε τα χρήματα σήμερα.
translations.nb: Vi vil overføre pengene i dag.
translations.id: Kami ingin transfer uang hari ini.
translations.sv: Vi vill föra över pengarna idag.
translations.da: Vi vil overføre pengene i dag.
translations.ja: 私たちは今日お金を振り込みたい。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (V2); expresses volition and selects a bare infinitive at clause end.
Definite article, accusative neuter singular, introducing the direct object NP.
Common noun (neuter); head of the direct object NP governed by the verb.
Temporal adverb modifying the event/time reference.
Lexical verb in infinitive; inseparable-prefix verb; governed by the modal auxiliary and placed clause-finally.

sentences.target: Ich will dir das Geld gleich überweisen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç vɪl diːɐ̯ das ɡɛlt ɡlaɪ̯ç ˌyːbɐˈvaɪ̯zn̩/

translations.de: Ich will dir das Geld gleich überweisen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç vɪl diːɐ̯ das ɡɛlt ɡlaɪ̯ç ˌyːbɐˈvaɪ̯zn̩/
translations.en: I want to transfer the money to you right away.
translations.es: Quiero transferirte el dinero ahora mismo.
translations.fr: Je veux te virer l'argent tout de suite.
translations.ko: 나는 지금 바로 너한테 돈을 이체하고 싶어.
translations.ru: Я хочу сразу перевести тебе деньги.
translations.pt: Quero te transferir o dinheiro agora mesmo.
translations.he: אני רוצה להעביר לך את הכסף מיד.
translations.tr: Parayı hemen sana havale etmek istiyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn chuyển tiền cho bạn ngay.
translations.ar: أريد أن أحوّل لك المال فورًا.
translations.nl: Ik wil het geld meteen naar jou overmaken.
translations.uk: Я хочу одразу переказати тобі гроші.
translations.hu: Azonnal át akarom utalni neked a pénzt.
translations.hi: मैं अभी तुम्हें पैसे ट्रांसफर करना चाहता हूँ.
translations.pl: Chcę od razu przelać ci pieniądze.
translations.el: Θέλω να σου μεταφέρω τα χρήματα αμέσως.
translations.nb: Jeg vil overføre pengene til deg med en gang.
translations.id: Saya mau transfer uang ke kamu sekarang.
translations.sv: Jag vill föra över pengarna till dig direkt.
translations.ro: Vreau să îți transfer banii imediat.
translations.da: Jeg vil overføre pengene til dig med det samme.
translations.ja: すぐにあなたにお金を振り込みたい。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary (V2); expresses volition and selects a bare infinitive at clause end.
2nd person singular dative personal pronoun; indirect object/recipient.

Lexical verb in infinitive; inseparable-prefix verb; governed by the modal auxiliary and placed clause-finally.
